data.message: Engine offers 'Play Elusive and move to Study (Aberrant Gateway)' while Skids is already AT Study, which is the only revealed location. Per rules_reference.md 'Move': 'When an entity or game element moves, it cannot move to its same (current) placement. If there is no valid destination for a move, the move cannot be attempted.' Elusive's move has no valid destination (no other revealed enemy-free location exists), so this option should not offer a move to my current location — it should either be unavailable or at minimum not move me to my own location.
